array_types.name: Derivation_Matrix
array_types.code: type Derivation_Matrix is array (Nonterminal_ID) of Token_ID_Set;

array_types.name: Full_Lookahead_Set
array_types.code: type Full_Lookahead_Set is array (1 .. K) of Token.Terminal_ID;

array_types.name: Nonterminal_ID_Set
array_types.code: type Nonterminal_ID_Set is array (Nonterminal_ID) of Boolean;

array_types.name: Token_ID_Set
array_types.code: type Token_ID_Set is array (Token.Token_ID) of Boolean;

record_types.name: Item_Lookahead
Item_Node
Item_Set
Item_Set_List
Set_Reference

subprograms.name: Add

documentation.description: Add an item to the set without checking to see if it is in there already.

subprograms.name: Find
subprograms.code:
function Find
  (Left  : in Item_Node;
   Right : in Item_Set)
  return Item_Ptr

documentation.description:
Return a pointer to an item in Right that matches Left.Prod,
Left.Dot, null if not found.

subprograms.name: Find
subprograms.code:
function Find
  (Left  : in Item_Set;
   Right : in Item_Set_List)
  return Item_Set_Ptr

documentation.description: Return a pointer to Left in Right, null if not found.

subprograms.name: Find
subprograms.code:
function Find
  (State : in Unknown_State_Index;
   Sets  : in Item_Set_List)
  return Item_Set_Ptr

documentation.description: Return a pointer to the set in Sets containing State, null if not found.

subprograms.name: First_Derivations

documentation.description:
For each nonterminal in the given grammar, find the set of
tokens that its first term could start with.

subprograms.name: Free
subprograms.code: procedure Free (Subject : in out Item_Node)

subprograms.code: procedure Free (Subject : in out Item_Set)

subprograms.code: procedure Free (Subject : in out Item_Set_List)

subprograms.name: Goto_Set
subprograms.code:
function Goto_Set
  (From   : in Item_Set;
   Symbol : in Token.Token_ID)
  return Item_Set_Ptr

subprograms.name: Goto_Transitions
Has_Empty_Production
subprograms.code: function Has_Empty_Production (Grammar : in Production_List.Instance) return Nonterminal_ID_Set

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Item : in Token_ID_Set) return String

subprograms.name: Include
Include
Is_In

function Is_In
  (Left  : in Item_Set;
   Right : in Item_Set_List)
  return Boolean

subprograms.name: Is_In
Item_Node_Of
subprograms.code:
function Item_Node_Of
  (Prod  : in OpenToken.Production.Instance;
   State : in Unknown_State_Index)
  return Item_Node

subprograms.name: Item_Node_Of
Lookahead_Closure

documentation.description:
Return the lookahead closure of Set over Grammar. First must be
the result of First_Derivations.

subprograms.name: LR0_Kernels
Print

subprograms.code: function Print (Item : in Item_Lookahead_Ptr) return String

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code: procedure Put (Item : in Item_Node; Show_Lookaheads : in Boolean)

documentation.description: Put Item to Ada.Text_IO.Standard_Output. Does not end with New_Line.

documentation.description: Put Item to Ada.Text_IO.Standard_Output. Does not end with New_Line.

documentation.description: Put Item to Ada.Text_IO.Standard_Output. Does not end with New_Line.

generic_instantiations.name: Free
generic_instantiations.code: procedure Free is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation (Item_Lookahead, Item_Lookahead_Ptr);
